raw.message: For those who dream of piloting their own Robot!

hook.summary: Fast-paced mech combat resulting in a satisfying kill confirmed by an announcer.
hook.visual_action: A red mech fires heavy artillery at an enemy robot, causing an explosion and a 'KILL' UI pop-up.

scene_flow: Player mech engages an enemy robot with heavy gunfire in an industrial setting.
Enemy is destroyed, triggering a 'KILL' notification and announcer voice.
Player continues to target other enemies while moving through the map.
Transition to a black screen with 'INSTALL NOW!' text and fire sparks.
audience_proxy: Action-oriented male gamers who enjoy tactical shooter games and giant robot combat.
